function.name: createScheduleTask
function.description: Create a new schedule task in the local SQLite reminder database.

ReminderTime.description: Reminder time in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM[:SS] format, or HH:MM[:SS] when TaskDate is provided.

TaskContent.description: What the assistant should remind the user about.

ReminderStatus.description: Reminder delivery status. Usually use 未提醒 when creating a new task.

TaskStatus.description: Current task execution status. Usually use 未完成 for a new task.
